programmes.show_description: Craoladh ar imeachtaí na maidine de riar na hoibre i nDáil Éireann. (Coverage of today's proceedings in Dáil Éireann.)
Sraith cheoil á cur i láthair ag Cormac de Barra. (A slick music series presented by Cormac de Barra.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Fiosraíonn Kevin Magee an titim i ndaonra na tuaithe. (Kevin Magee investigates the extent of rural decline in Ireland.)
Is ag Seó Bhaile Mhoireil in Aontroim a bheifear sa gclár seo. (In this episode we get a taste of the Balmoral Show in Antrim.)
Is in Brno na Seicia a bheidh Louise, Séaghan agus Proinsias an tseachtain seo. (Join Louise, Séaghan, and Proinsias in Brno, Czechia's underrated second city.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tagann Bréidín agus Clúmh ar bhóín Dé. (Tweedy and Fluff find a ladybird in the craft room.)
Beidh na Singalings ag breathnú ar an hainmhithe agus na plandaí a bhíonn le fáil sa bhfásach. (The Singalings name all the animals that live in the desert.)
Tá Dora agus Bróigín i dTír na Sí. An mbeidh siad in ann an draíocht a thabhairt slán? (Dora and Boots are in Fairytale Land.)
Tá Abby agus Rudy ag dul chuig an mbácús. (Abby and Rudy are having an amazing adventure at a bakery shop!)
Tá Pip ag maisiú maisc do Posy i ngan fhios di. (Pip is decorating a mask as a surprise for Posy.)
Dreapann na hOlobobanna tuar ceatha agus péinteálann siad an spéir. (The Olobobs climb a rainbow and draw in the sky with magic paint!)
Goidtear an criostal gealaí as an gceanncheathrú. (The Moon Crystal has been stolen from the PJ Masks.)
Cuireann Wussywat agus a cuid cairde sicín beag ag caoineadh trí thimpiste. (Wussywat and friends accidentally make a newly hatched little chick cry.)
Níl mórán fonn ar Zou siopa an Uasail Zoey a ghlanadh. (Zou is reluctant to help tidy up Mr Zoey's shop.)
Tá Ricky ar thóir eachtraíochta inniu. (Today, Ricky is in search of an adventure, but will he find one?)
Bíonn Ginger agus na Piseanna-Rex ag imirt folach bíog nuair a théann Ginger amú! (Ginger gets lost while playing hide and seek with the Pea-Rexes.)
Tosaíonn Dot agus Ruby feachtas le cead a fháil madraí a thabhairt ar scoil. (Dot and Ruby campaign to allow dogs on school campus.)
Insíonn Bean Berg d'Ella faoin uair a bhí sí i Haváí. (Mrs Berg tells Ella all about her travels in Hawaii.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá Lola an-tógtha le cleasa draíochta nua Charlie. (Charlie has a new magic kit and Lola is very impressed by it.)
Is beag nach ndéantar aonbheannach de Bhéibhinn nuair a thugtar adhaircín di mar bhronntanas! (After receiving a horn as a present, Béibhinn is nearly transformed into a unicorn!)
Titeann an fáinne nua a fuair athair Lola dá máthair síos sa doirteal! (Lola's Dad is going to give her mother a ring, but Lola drops it in the sink!)
Tá an fliú ar thuismitheoirí Angelo. (Angelo's mom and dad both get the flu.)
Tá slándáil sonraí imithe sa gcloigeann ar Learaí. (Learaí becomes obsessed with data security.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán spraíúil faoi bheith sásta a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about being happy!)
Is Gníomhaire Rúnda í Cúig Déag. (Hush, hush! Agent Fifteen here, with a smashing new way to save the day: the Super Special Secret Step Squad!)
Tá fonn ar Dhubh agus ar Bhán dul ag spraoi inniu! (Black and White come to play!)
An mbeidh na Blociontais in ann cabhrú le Sicín an Gníomhaire Rúnda cró na gcearc a oscailt? (Can the Wonderblocks help Secret Agent Chicken crack the password to the henhouse?)
Beidh an coimeádaí zú John ag insint dúinn faoi na hainmhithe éagsúla ar fad atá sa zú. (Today, John the zookeeper introduces us to the diverse array of animals found in the zoo.)
Tá Pip ag iarraidh ar Posy grianghraf a thógáil de ag déanamh réaltléim ach tá sé níos deacra ná mar a shíl sé. (Pip asks Posy to take a photograph of him doing a star jump.)
Ba mhaith le Ribín dul ag ceol in éineacht le Rocco ach níl aon cheol aici. (Ribín wants to play music with Rocco but she has a problem, her music is awful.)
Daltaí Ghaelscoil Chluain Dolcáin a rachaidh i mbun pinn an tseachtain seo chun amhrán a chumadh faoi laethanta saoire. (Music series for children presented by John Sharpson.)
Baineann George an-sult as dul ag campáil den chéad uair. (George really enjoys his first camping trip.)
Samhlaíonn Muireann a saol ina tiománaí bus nuair a bheidh sí mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Muireann imagines her life as a bus driver when she grows up.)
Féachann Zou le héalú ó Mham mar nach bhfuil sé ag iarraidh dul a chodladh go fóill. (Zou does his best to avoid Mom's attention as he does not want to go to bed.)
Tá cóisir mhór eagraithe ag an Méara ach meas tú an mbeidh an bia ar fad réitithe in am ag Tiggy? (The Mayor has organised a big party but will Tiggy have all the food prepped?)
Cat ciotach, breithlá mór agus eilifint nach dtaitníonn rudaí gan choinne leis a bheidh againn inniu. (We'll see surprise entrances, surprise exits and surprise birthdays.)
Eilín Ní Bheaglaoich a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín Tom Sheáinín an tseachtain seo. (Eilín Ní Bheaglaoich will join Máirtín Tom Sheainín on this week¿s programme.)
Tá múinteoir dian nua ag rang Krelboynes. (Malcolm and the Krelboynes do battle with a tough new teacher.)
Socraíonn Diane cead a thabhairt d'ealaíontóir a portráid a phéinteáil. (Diane refuses to listen to Sam and agrees to have her portrait painted.)
Beidh ceol ó Jackie Daly, Maura O'Keefe, Seamus Creagh agus Paul de Grae ar an gclár seo. (This episode features Jackie Daly, Maura O'Keefe, Seamus Creagh and Paul de Grae.)
Téann Jessica chun na hAstráile lena chur in iúl gurb ise an t-oidhre ar 130,000 acra de thalamh. (Jessica travels to Australia to prove that she is the heir to grazing land.)
Má chaitear súil ar fheithidí i gceart feictear cé chomh riachtanach agus spéisiúil is atá siad. (If we take a look at the world of insects we soon realise how important they are.)
Rachaidh Paul Murton ó chósta amháin in Albain go cósta eile sa gclár seo. (In this episode Paul Murton is crossing Scotland from coast to coast.)
Beidh Jimmy Buckley agus Alan Tobin ar stáitse sa gclár seo. (Jimmy Buckley and Alan Tobin will perform on the show.)
Ní ionann Sandra agus daoine eile a bhí ag iarraidh teach nua a cheannach. (Sandra is not your typical house hunter.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

Téann Leithreas Lugh siar san am chun cúrsaí staire a chur as riocht. (Leithreas Lugh goes back in time to mess with history.)

Tugann trí fhoireann aghaidh ar a chéile chun an pota óir a bhuachan. Seó cluichí á chur i láthair ag Eibhlín Ní Chonghaile. (Gameshow in which 3 teams compete to win the jackpot.)
Tugtar léargas ar na pobail i sé cheantar i nGaeltacht Mhúscraí i gContae Chorcaí sa tsraith seo. (In this series we get an insight into the communities of the Múscraí Gaeltacht.)
Ta aiféala ar Natasha faoi na rudaí atá déanta aici agus ligean sí a rún le Sonny. (Natasha is regretting her manic choices and ends up confiding in Sonny.)

Clár faisnéise faoi bheirt atá ag troid ar son chearta uisce sa tSile. (Documentary following two water defenders fighting for water rights in Chile.)

Ta aiféala ar Natasha faoi na rudaí atá déanta aici agus ligean sí a rún le Sonny. (Natasha is regretting her manic choices and ends up confiding in Sonny.)
Ceistíonn Olmstead Lorraine faoi bhean a mic ach ní ligean Lorraine tada uirthi féin. (Officer Olmstead questions Lorraine about her daughter-in-law.)
Craoladh ar imeachtaí na maidine de riar na hoibre i nDáil Éireann. (Coverage of today's proceedings in Dáil Éireann.)
Súil siar ar athimirt Chluiche Ceannais Iomána 2013 idir an Clár agus Corcaigh. (Highlights from Clare v Cork in the 2013 All-Ireland Hurling Final Replay.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Tugtar léargas ar na pobail i sé cheantar i nGaeltacht Mhúscraí i gContae Chorcaí sa tsraith seo. (In this series we get an insight into the communities of the Múscraí Gaeltacht.)
Liam Griffin Loch Garman a bheidh faoi sholas sa chlár deiridh den tsraith. (For the series finale of Laochra Gael comes the story of Wexford's Liam Griffin.)
Olé! Tugann Proinsias, Séaghan agus Louise aghaidh ar Sevilla an tseachtain seo. (Olé! This week, the lads dive headfirst into the vibrant festivities of Seville's Feria de Abril.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Socraíonn Bréidín Clúmh a thabhairt amach ag siúl. (Tweedy is eager to take Fluff out for a walk.)
Tá an leoraí athchúrsála ar an mbealach! (The recycling truck comes rolling down the street!)
Baa Baa a Chaora Dhubh, an bhfuil aon olann agat? (Baa Baa Black Sheep, have you any wool?)
Faigheann Bróigín léine nua do Tico. (Boots gets a shirt as a gift for Tico.)
Ag foghlaim faoi bheith ag siúl le madra a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about dog walking today.)
Tá cluiche nua ag Pip dó féin agus do Posy. (Pip devises a fun adventure quest for him and Posy to play but things don't go to plan.)
Tá na seilidí móra corcra i bhfad ró-mhór don fhoraois! (Some giant purple shellbobs are brought down to size by Giddy Up.)
Tá Armadylan cinnte go bhfuil sé féin agus Romeo i bpáirt. (When the playground is stolen, The PJ Masks find out it was Romeo.)
Tá Wussywat ag cur caoi ar scútar le go mbeidh sí in ann a bheith ag rásaíocht in éineacht le Jinja. (Wussywat fixes a scooter so she can play with Jinja.)
Ní maith le Clifford a bheith ina aonar nuair a chaitheann Emily Eilís an oíche tigh Chaitlín. (Clifford is nervous to be alone when Samantha & Emily Elizabeth have a sleepover.)
Cuireann Woozle in iúl dá chuid cairde go bhfuil cion mór aige orthu. Ach an bhfuil duine éigin fágtha ar lár aige? (Woozle is telling all his friends how much he likes them.)
Tosaíonn Ginger agus na Piseanna-Rex óga ag búireach agus ní fada go mbíonn gach neach beo ag búireach freisin. (Ginger and the baby Pea-Rexes start a massive roar off.)
Ní mór do Alice smaoineamh ceart uirthi féin. (Alice needs to organise her thoughts.)
Tá rún ag Alice dul chuig an ngruagaire. (Alice is thinking about going to the hairdresser.)
Téann Alice ar safari. (Alice is on a safari.)
Níl a fhios ag Síle céard a cheart di a thabhairt isteach ar scoil. (Surg can't decide what to take for show and tell.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Lá breithe Charlie atá ann agus tá sé ag iarraidh go mbeadh téama arrachta ag a chóisir. (It is Charlie's birthday, and he is planning a monster themed birthday party.)
Tá giuirléid nua ag Mactrapp a bhfuil sé ag iarraidh béar bán a ghabháil léi! (Danny Mactrapp has invented a new gadget and plans to use it to capture a polar bear.)
Tá Lola agus a hathair ag tógáil botháin ach cuireann sé seo isteach ar na Guanos. (The Guanos are not happy when they can no longer watch Lola's TV.)
Tá Angelo ag iarraidh go dtiocfadh an banna 'Slobber' chuig an scoil. (Angelo wants the band Slobber to play at his school.)
Smaoiníonn Dónall ar an saol dá mbeadh na tuismitheoirí is fearr ann aige féin. (Dónall imagine having perfect parents.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán géimiúil faoi bheith ag siúl taobh amuigh a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about going for a walk outside.)
Léann Cúig Déag scéalta do na déaga. (Are you sitting comfortably? Then we'll begin a bedtime story all about Numberblocks Eleven to Fifteen.)
Na dathanna áille atá le fáil sa gcoill a bheidh againn inniu. (Today, we get to see all the beautiful Colours that we can find in the forest.)
Tá dinnéar Bhó sáinnithe sa gcró! An mbeidh Gabh agus Stop in ann cabhrú léi? (Cow's dinner is stuck in the hayloft! Can Stop and Go help her reach her meal?)
Déanann Timmy agus Yabba inneall dóiteáin as sean-bhosca cairtchláir. (Timmy and Yabba make a fire engine out of an old cardboard box.)
Tá Éabhinn leis an lá a chaitheamh in éineacht lena Daideo Dónal. (Éabhinn is going to spend the day with her Daideo.)
Tá Pip agus Posy le haghaidh a thabhairt ar Jamila agus ar Zac i gcomórtas. (Pip and Posy team up against Jamila and Zac in Frankie's Action Quiz.)
Taitníonn an cluiche 'Búm, Búm, Gorm!' le Bromaire. (Bromaire loves to play 'Boom, Boom Blue'.)
Tá lomán aimsithe ag Lasairín. Ba mhaith léi go mbeadh na Béiríní ar fad in ann spraoi leis. (Lasairín finds a log and tries to find a way for all of the Bears to play with it.)
Níl na Bíosúin in ann rud ar bith a fháil sa trucail taco. (At the Taco Truck, the Bison Brothers are flustered.)
Samhlaíonn Sonaí a shaol ina phríomhoide nuair a bheidh sé mór le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Sonaí imagines his life as a principal, with the help of the Job Fairy.)
Cabhróidh Zou le Zak a chuid obair bhaile a dhéanamh inniu. (Zou helps Zak with his home work today.)
Moncaí ar mire, iora ar cheamara, muc chliste agus mús le luas a bheidh againn inniu! (Today we'll see monkey mugshots, squirrel selfies and there's a moose on the loose!)
Micheál Ó hÓráin a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín Tom Sheáinín ar an gclár seo. (Micheál Ó hÓráin from Partry will be chatting to Máirtín Tom Sheáinín on this show.)
Tá plandáil mhuintir Blanche le leagan agus tá sí ag cur ina aghaidh. (Blanche protests the demolition of the family's plantation.)
Tá Blanche faoi gheasa ag saighdiúir atá tagtha abhaile ó Mhurascaill na Peirse. (A soldier returning from the Persian Gulf sweeps Blanche off her feet.)
Scoth an cheoil ó cheann ceann na tíre, beidh an banna Nomos as Corcaigh ar an gclár seo. (A traditional music series, the group Nomos from Cork will feature in this show.)
Dúnmharaítear úinéir luaimh, a bhfuil neart airgid aige, dhá lá roimh sula dtosaíonn rása mór. (Jessica investigates when a wealthy yachtsman is murdered before a big race.)
Liam Griffin Loch Garman a bheidh faoi sholas sa chlár deiridh den tsraith. (For the series finale of Laochra Gael comes the story of Wexford's Liam Griffin.)
Cuireann Paul Murton tús lena aistear i Linne Foirthe agus tugann sé aghaidh ar Siorrachd Pheairt. (Paul Murton travels from the shores of the Firth of Forth to Perthshire.)
Is iad John Hogan agus Ronan Quigley a bheidh ar stáitse sa gclár seo. (John Hogan and Ronan Quigley will be on stage in this show.)
Tá rún ag Allana agus Aaron bogadh gar den teorainn idir Queensland agus New South Wales.(Allana and Aaron are looking for a new life near the Queensland and New South Wales border.)
